events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario involves flanged joints with an incomplete bolt pattern at rough-complete stage. ASME PCC-1 and B16.5 require all bolts to be installed in flanged joints. An incomplete bolt pattern is non-compliant and the joint is installed-defective. Decision: fail. Risk: high (potential leak/pressure boundary failure).
